objective: Fix Playwright hangs, add image content filtering, re-run sample CLI to validate.
non_goals: No automated scheduling or background publishing
No weakening of fail-closed evidence requirements

completed: Browser close-early: Browser closes after collectImages, before OCR/VLM loop (prevents idle crash during long Ollama calls).
Image content filtering: isUserContentImage() path filter (zboard/data only) + isImageLargeEnough() size filter (>=100px, JPEG header parse).
Content selector specificity: chooseContentSelector now picks first specific selector (td.board-contents) instead of sorting by text length which caused body to win.
Per-image error isolation: try/catch around each image's OCR/VLM in the loop so one failure doesn't kill the entire post or trigger full retries.
Progress logging: Every step logs (navigation, parsing, selector, images, OCR, VLM).
Ollama defaults: timeout 30s (was 60s), retries 1 (was 2) in config/env.ts.
collectImages: .catch() guards on count() and getAttribute(), MAX_IMAGES=20 cap, 60s screenshot timeout.
Browser close flag: browserClosed boolean prevents double-close in finally block.
gaps: Sample CLI has NOT been run successfully yet with all fixes applied.

Post 501129d1c17f has NO user content images (0 zboard/data images). It will fall back to fullPage screenshot. Need to verify this path works or decide if it should be treated as 'no images' gracefully.
Post 8b04be29c969 has 4 user content images after filter. This should work.
run-summary.json has never been written (all prior runs were killed/timed out).

decisions_locked: Fallback model: qwen2.5vl:3b when primary (qwen2.5vl:7b) fails.
Fail-closed: missing products or evidence must throw error.
Image filter: path-based (zboard/data) + size heuristic (>=100px, JPEG header parse).
Content selector: specific selectors preferred over body, regardless of text length.
Per-image try/catch: single image failure logs warning, continues with remaining images.
acceptance_criteria: Each record includes products, posted_at, and non-empty evidence sources.
Deterministic parser is used first; OCR/VLM is fallback only.
No hangs or indefinite waits — all Playwright calls have timeouts.
Post with 0 user images either uses deterministic parse or fullPage fallback.
implementation_plan: Run: npm run competitor-ads:intel -- --input-csv examples/competitor-ads-intel.sample.csv --run-id sample-20260509-v7 --rate-limit-rps 1
If post 501129d1c17f fails (0 user images), check if deterministic parse is sufficient or if fullPage screenshot fallback path needs debugging.
practical_recommendations: Start with npm run competitor-ads:intel -- --input-csv examples/competitor-ads-intel.sample.csv --run-id sample-20260509-v7 --rate-limit-rps 1
Watch for: [postId] selector matched: div.JS_ContentMain td.board-contents (confirms selector fix)
Watch for: [postId] kept N user content images (confirms image filter)
If 501129d1c17f has 0 images and fails: the fullPage screenshot at line 758-761 should create a fallback image. Check if that path works.
If still hangs: check which step the last log message was at — it's the next operation to investigate.
pending_items: Run sample CLI and confirm successful records output.
Handle post 501129d1c17f (0 user content images) — either deterministic parse covers it or fullPage fallback needs fixing.
decisions: Prefer deterministic HTML parsing (Cheerio), use OCR/VLM only when confidence < 0.9 or products missing.
Keep evidence sources non-empty and fail the run if evidence is missing.
constraints: Manual execution only; no automated scheduler for competitor intel.
Do not log secrets or credentials.
Publisher/observer systems must remain fail-closed for missing evidence.

Monitor output for selector match, image count, OCR/VLM progress.
If 501129d1c17f fails with 0 images, investigate fullPage fallback path.

key_code_changes.chooseContentSelector: Iterates selectors specific->generic, picks first with >20 chars text. Returns 'body' as last resort.
key_code_changes.isUserContentImage: Returns true if src includes 'zboard/data' or starts with 'data:'
key_code_changes.isImageLargeEnough: JPEG header parse for SOF0 dimensions; fallback to buffer.length >= 2048.
key_code_changes.processPostIsolated: Browser closed after collectImages via closeQuietly + browserClosed flag. Per-image try/catch in OCR/VLM loop.
key_code_changes.callOllamaGenerate: Logs model name, attempt count, response length on every call.
